title: ilex retusa
intro: Ilex retusa, also known as the Japanese holly or Japanese evergreen holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex retusa include reducing the risk of cancer, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antimicrobial properties. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be taken internally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
